name: 戏剧表演
subject: inquiry
domain_name: 表演艺术 / Performing Arts / Performing Arts
curriculum_points: Students will be able to participate in guided dramatic play and simple performances, understanding the role of an audience (K-2).
Students will be able to contribute to a collaborative theatre performance, taking on specific responsibilities (e.g., actor, designer, stagehand) and reflecting on the process (3-5).
